text.tspan: MASS MERGE EVENT
@unhappychoice triggers Dependabot across 20 repos simultaneously. Chaos ensues.
WEDNESDAY SURGE
@unhappychoice fires off 100 commits in a single day. Keyboard reportedly still smoking.
SNAPSHOT FRENZY
@unhappychoice refreshes OSS snapshots 160+ times. Scientists cannot explain the compulsion.
SECURITY ALERT
@unhappychoice neutralizes RUSTSEC advisory in splashboard. Crisis averted. Barely.
LITERARY BOMBSHELL
@unhappychoice publishes 'meetings are shackled play.' Corporate world shaken to its core.
NO DAYS OFF
@unhappychoice commits every single day for 7 days straight. Sleep status: unknown.
78 APPROVALS
@unhappychoice rubber-stamps 78 PRs across 5 orgs. Thumb reportedly in critical condition.
META MOMENT
@unhappychoice reviews deariary/github-weekly-reporter — the tool writing this very ticker.
